aboutMe.title: About Me
aboutMe.description: I build solutions for complex problems. Focused on software architecture, AI integration, and clean code.

items.content: Fullstack Developer & UTN Student. I architect production-grade applications with a focus on technical excellence. Specializing in the modern React and Node ecosystem, I build resilient systems and intuitive interfaces that drive business value.

Software Architecture. From crafting high-performance Frontend architectures to designing robust Backend APIs, I deliver end-to-end solutions that are scalable, maintainable, and optimized for growth.

AI-Powered Innovation. I leverage Large Language Models to automate complex workflows and build intelligent product features. I focus on practical AI implementation that enhances user productivity and business efficiency.

content.title: About
content.subtitle: Building systems, not just features.
content.bio: I'm a Fullstack Developer and UTN student based in Argentina. I design software architecture and integrate AI to solve real business problems. Instead of just writing code, I build resilient web applications that scale effortlessly and feel intuitive to use.
content.details: My approach is minimalist: reduce complexity, improve maintainability, and focus on what matters. I'm currently looking for fullstack roles where I can tackle deep architectural challenges and build intelligent, future-proof products.

disclaimers: Might invent some facts. Like my confidence writing CSS from scratch.
Powered by LLMs and a concerning amount of mate.
100% AI-generated. Any bugs are probably @figueroaignacio's fault.
Built while procrastinating on UTN assignments.
Answers rely on the vibe of the current React render cycle.
Not a real developer, just a highly advanced copy-paste script.
Trained on Ignacio's codebase. Please lower your expectations.
Running on Next.js, so it's fast. Or at least it looks fast.
I answer quickly so you don't realize I'm just guessing.
Caution: May occasionally drop unprompted opinions about TypeScript.
Powered by AI, supervised by a guy who really likes dark mode.
If I say something wrong, tell Ignacio. He needs the Jira tickets.
So advanced, it only occasionally forgets how to center a div.
A collaboration between artificial intelligence and natural exhaustion.
Designed with Tailwind. Or as I call it, 'inline styles but socially acceptable'.
Still learning exactly like Ignacio, but without the UTN exams.
Works best when prompted with a virtual mate.
It's not a hallucination, it's a 'creative interpretation of your prompt'.
Deployed on a Friday. What's the worst that could happen?
